commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: It must be said that not every strong person is also wise, but every wise person is strong, because although one may be physically weak, he will still be able to overcome every strength of the enemy, that is, the devil, if he has wisdom.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Riches. Septuagint, "to him, the rich man, he no where appears. He has prepared "(Haydock)
Like. Hebrew, "as the eagle, it will fly "(Haydock)
We must therefore fix our hearts on more durable goods.
